ddls:
CREATE TABLE "layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "layer_type" TEXT /* Type of layer (e.g., IMINT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the layer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the layer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the layer was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the layer (active/inactive) */,
  "parent_layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent layer (if applicable) */,
  "geographic_extent" TEXT /* Geographic extent of the layer (bounding box) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of object (e.g., vehicle, building) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the object was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the object (active/inactive) */,
  "parent_object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent object (if applicable) */,
  "geospatial_coordinates" TEXT /* Geospatial coordinates of the object (latitude, longitude, altitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sector was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sector (active/inactive) */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (if applicable) */,
  "geographic_extent" TEXT /* Geographic extent of the sector (bounding box) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_layers" (
  "object_layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object-layer relationship */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the relationship (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_layers_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_layers_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_orientations" (
  "orientation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orientation */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "orientation" INTEGER /* Orientation of the object */,
  "data" INTEGER /* Data associated with the object */,
  "x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the object */,
  "y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the object */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the orientation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the orientation was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the orientation (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orientation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_orientations_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_sector_history" (
  "sector_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector history entry */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the object entered the sector */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date the object exited the sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the history entry was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the history entry (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_sector_history_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_sector_history_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active/inactive) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access log (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_analytics" (
  "sector_analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector analytics entry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "object_count" INTEGER /* Number of objects in the sector */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the objects entered the sector */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date the objects exited the sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics entry was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analytics entry (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_analytics_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)
